docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TALMADGE, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT OZKAN, SEZER AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
